landing.badge: Ab Advanced AI ke saath powered
landing.headline: Wo Sarkari Yojnaen Dhundein Jinke Liye
landing.subtext: Koi lambe forms nahi. Koi confusion nahi. Bas apne baare mein simple language mein batao, aur baaki kaam hamara AI karta hai.
landing.heroChat1: Namaste! Aaj main aapko kaun si yojana dhundhne mein madad karun?
landing.heroChat2: Main Bihar ka student hoon aur scholarship dhundh raha hoon.
landing.heroChat3: Bihar Post Matric Scholarship mili! Kya aap aur detail chahte hain?
landing.featuresSubtext: Indian government benefits ki complex duniya ko simple banana.
landing.feature1Desc: Hamara smart assistant aapki profile analyse karta hai aur seconds mein batata hai ki aap kin yojnaon ke liye yogya hain.
landing.feature2Title: Simple Language Mein Kaam Karta Hai
landing.feature2Desc: Koi complex jargon nahi. Humse Hindi, English ya Hinglish mein baat karein jaise kisi dost se.
landing.feature3Desc: Hum poori process mein aapka guidance dete hain, required documents aur application steps clearly samjhate hain.
landing.feature4Desc: Hum sirf official .gov.in websites se information aur links dete hain aapki safety ke liye.
landing.howItWorksSubtext: Teen aasaan steps mein apne benefits se match karein.
landing.step1Desc: Apni income, state aur occupation ke baare mein kuch simple sawalon ke jawab dein.
landing.step2Desc: Aapki profile ke liye specially curated sarkari yojnaon ki list paayein.
landing.step3Desc: Apply kaise karein seekhein aur ek hi dashboard mein apne application ka progress track karein.
landing.trust2: Students aur families ke liye banaya gaya
landing.footerDesc: Indian sarkari yojnaon mein navigate karne ke liye aapka AI-powered companion.
landing.disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: Yeh ek independent assistant tool hai. Yeh koi official government website nahi hai. Hum publicly available government data ke basis par information dete hain.

auth.welcomeBack: Swagat hai! Jaari rakhne ke liye apna email darj karein.
auth.enterOtp: Jaari rakhne ke liye koi bhi 4-digit code darj karein.

tracker.title: Mere Applications
tracker.empty: Abhi tak koi tracked application nahi hai.

scam.title: Scam Protection Checker
scam.subtext: Check karein ki koi scheme website government se officially recognized hai ya nahi.

helpers.title: Local Helpers
helpers.subtext: Schemes ke liye apply karne mein madad ke liye nearby centers ya agents khojein.

formHelp.title: Sahayak AI
formHelp.subtext: Official forms bharte waqt sawaal poochein
formHelp.welcome: Namaste! Main aapka Sahayak AI hoon. Official portal par form bharte waqt mujhe side window mein khula rakhein. Aapko kis term ya step mein madad chahiye?

chat.yourSchemes: Yeh yojnaen hain jinke liye aap yogya ho sakte hain:
chat.noSchemes: Aapki profile ke liye koi yojana nahi mili. Apne jawab badal kar dekhein.
